title: Fix reaction to the edge event at zero time

features.name: signal reassigned at time zero triggering posedge always block
features.description: Code should include a signal declared with an initial value that is reassigned at time 0 within an initial block, with a posedge-sensitive always block that should trigger on this change

features.name: static variable initialization before procedure start
features.description: Code should include a static variable with its initial value set at declaration, where the initial value must be visible to always blocks before any initial procedures start
features.snippet:
logic signed [7:0] counter = 0;
always @(posedge clk) counter <= counter + 1;
